mapper.select:
SELECT b.BOM_ID as bomId, b.PLANT_CD as plantCd, b.PARENT_ITEM_CD as parentItemCd, p.ITEM_NM as parentItemNm, b.CHILD_ITEM_CD as childItemCd, c.ITEM_NM as childItemNm, b.BOM_LEVEL as bomLevel, b.BOM_QTY as bomQty, b.LOSS_RATE as lossRate, DATE_FORMAT(b.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDt, DATE_FORMAT(b.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDt, b.PROCESS_CD as processCd, b.BOM_RMK as bomRmk, b.USE_YN as useYn FROM MST_BOM b LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM p ON b.PARENT_ITEM_CD = p.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM c ON b.CHILD_ITEM_CD = c.ITEM_CD
ORDER BY b.PARENT_ITEM_CD ASC, b.BOM_LEVEL ASC, b.CHILD_ITEM_CD ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MST_BOM b LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM p ON b.PARENT_ITEM_CD = p.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM c ON b.CHILD_ITEM_CD = c.ITEM_CD

SELECT b.BOM_ID as bomId, b.PLANT_CD as plantCd, b.PARENT_ITEM_CD as parentItemCd, p.ITEM_NM as parentItemNm, b.CHILD_ITEM_CD as childItemCd, c.ITEM_NM as childItemNm, b.BOM_LEVEL as bomLevel, b.BOM_QTY as bomQty, b.LOSS_RATE as lossRate, DATE_FORMAT(b.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDt, DATE_FORMAT(b.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDt, b.PROCESS_CD as processCd, b.BOM_RMK as bomRmk, b.USE_YN as useYn FROM MST_BOM b LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM p ON b.PARENT_ITEM_CD = p.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM c ON b.CHILD_ITEM_CD = c.ITEM_CD WHERE b.BOM_ID = #{bomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST_BOM ( PLANT_CD, PARENT_ITEM_CD, CHILD_ITEM_CD, BOM_LEVEL, BOM_QTY, LOSS_RATE, START_DT, END_DT, PROCESS_CD, BOM_RMK, USE_YN, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{plantCd}, #{parentItemCd}, #{childItemCd}, COALESCE(#{bomLevel}, 1), #{bomQty}, COALESCE(#{lossRate}, 0), #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{processCd}, #{bomRmk}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), 'SYSTEM' )
mapper.update: UPDATE MST_BOM SET PARENT_ITEM_CD = #{parentItemCd}, CHILD_ITEM_CD = #{childItemCd}, BOM_LEVEL = COALESCE(#{bomLevel}, 1), BOM_QTY = #{bomQty}, LOSS_RATE = COALESCE(#{lossRate}, 0), START_DT = #{startDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, PROCESS_CD = #{processCd}, BOM_RMK = #{bomRmk}, USE_YN = COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), UPD_USER_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE BOM_ID = #{bomId}
